---
title: "telemetry.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\live\telemetry.ts"
loc: 27
complexity: 3
logic_score: 7.82
style_score: 3.87
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 6.81
---

## Intent
The `telemetry.ts` module implements the HTTP endpoints for agent telemetry. It handles incoming pings and mission traces, normalizes file paths for cross-platform consistency, and coordinates with the recorder and socket relay to ensure live data is persisted and broadcast.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate by registering the `handleTelemetryPing` and `handleTelemetryTrace` handlers with an Express application. These functions process incoming telemetry payloads and update the Gungnir Matrix state.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [Request](file://express)
- [Response](file://express)
- [SubspaceRelay](file://./socket.ts)
- [recordPing](file://./recorder.ts)
- [recordTrace](file://./recorder.ts)
- [AgentPing](file://../types.ts)

### Exports
- `normalizePath`
- `normalizePath`
- `handleTelemetryPing`
- `handleTelemetryPing`
- `ping`
- `handleTelemetryTrace`
- `handleTelemetryTrace`
- `trace`
